title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Granules India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Granules India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Granules India in Thane offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Granules India:
Granules India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Granules India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
